title: Django Host Metrics (opentelemetry)
description:
Monitor host performance using OpenTelemetry Collector's hostmetrics receiver. Includes CPU utilization, system load, memory usage, disk I/O throughput/IOPS, filesystem utilization, and network traffic. Features flexible host label filtering for Kubernetes or standalone deployments.

Requirements: OpenTelemetry Collector with hostmetrics receiver (cpu, disk, load, filesystem, memory, network scrapers) exporting to Prometheus with UnderscoreEscapingWithSuffixes translation strategy.
